nodes.name: Black-faced tanager
nodes.summary: Black-faced tanager（Schistochlamys melanopis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Black-faced tanager。

nodes.name: Black-faced tanager
nodes.summary: The black-faced tanager (Schistochlamys melanopis) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, French Guiana, Guyana, Paraguay, Peru, Suriname, and Venezuela. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, dry savanna, and subtropical or tropical dry shrubland. References External links Xeno-canto: audio recordings of the black-faced tanager
